# hcloud_zone_record (Resource)

Provides a Hetzner Cloud Zone Record resource.

This can be used to create, modify, and delete Zone Records.

It is not possible to set the Labels and Protection level for the RRSet that the Record belongs to.

See the [Zone RRSets API documentation](https://docs.hetzner.cloud/reference/cloud#zone-rrsets) for more details.

**Experimental:** DNS API is in beta, breaking changes may occur within minor releases.
See https://docs.hetzner.cloud/changelog#2025-10-07-dns-beta for more details.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the Zone Record.
- `type` (String) Type of the Zone Record.
- `value` (String) Value of the Zone Record.
- `zone` (String) ID or Name of the parent Zone.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Comment of the Zone Record.
- `ttl` (Number) Time To Live (TTL) of the Zone Record. All records with the same Name and Type must have the same TTL.
